name: Checkbox
description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked, unchecked, and optionally indeterminate states. Built on Base UI Checkbox with StyleX styling.

Root.description: The checkbox itself — a 16px square with a hidden <input> beside it.

checked.description: Whether the checkbox is currently ticked. Use for controlled mode.

defaultChecked.description: Whether the checkbox is initially ticked. Use for uncontrolled mode.

onCheckedChange.description: Callback fired when the checkbox is ticked or unticked.

indeterminate.description: Whether the checkbox is in a mixed state: neither ticked nor unticked.

disabled.description: Whether the component should ignore user interaction.

required.description: Whether the user must tick the checkbox before submitting a form.

name.description: Identifies the field when a form is submitted. Also registers the checkbox with a parent CheckboxGroup.

parent.description: When true inside a CheckboxGroup, this checkbox auto-derives its checked/indeterminate state from children. Used for select-all patterns.

dataAttributes.data-checked: Present when the checkbox is ticked.
dataAttributes.data-unchecked: Present when the checkbox is not ticked.
dataAttributes.data-indeterminate: Present when the checkbox is in a mixed state.
dataAttributes.data-disabled: Present when the checkbox is disabled.
dataAttributes.data-required: Present when the checkbox is required.
dataAttributes.data-readonly: Present when the checkbox is read-only.

Indicator.description: Visual indicator shown when the checkbox is checked or indeterminate. Renders a checkmark or dash icon. Uses keepMounted for enter/exit animation.

keepMounted.description: Whether to keep the element in the DOM when unchecked. Defaults to true for animation support.

dataAttributes.data-checked: Present when the checkbox is ticked.
dataAttributes.data-unchecked: Present when the checkbox is not ticked.
dataAttributes.data-indeterminate: Present when the checkbox is in a mixed state.
dataAttributes.data-starting-style: Present when the indicator is animating in.
dataAttributes.data-ending-style: Present when the indicator is animating out.

cssRequirements.description: Indicator enter/exit animation requires global CSS rules inside @layer priority1. StyleX cannot target data-attribute selectors, so these rules must live in the consumer's global stylesheet.

intents.reasoning: Checkbox is the standard control for toggling a boolean option that is saved with a form.
A required checkbox is the standard UX pattern for explicit consent before form submission.
intents.composition:
<label>
  <Checkbox.Root required>
    <Checkbox.Indicator />
  </Checkbox.Root>
  I agree to the terms and conditions
</label>

intents.reasoning: Multiple checkboxes let users select several items from a list. Combine with an indeterminate parent for 'select all'.

avoidWhen.scenario: Binary on/off toggle with immediate effect (e.g., dark mode)
avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Switch for settings that take effect immediately without a form submission step.

avoidWhen.scenario: Single selection from a group of mutually exclusive options
avoidWhen.reasoning: Checkboxes allow multiple selections. Use Radio for single-select groups.
Checkbox represents a state, not an action. Use Button for actions.

examples.name: basic
examples.code:
<label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
  <Checkbox.Root>
    <Checkbox.Indicator />
  </Checkbox.Root>
  Accept terms
</label>

examples.name: with-label
examples.description: Using a label element for accessibility
examples.code:
<label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, cursor: 'pointer' }}>
  <Checkbox.Root defaultChecked>
    <Checkbox.Indicator />
  </Checkbox.Root>
  Remember me
</label>
